---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

# stairtools

<!-- badges: start -->
<!-- badges: end -->

`stairtools` provides tools to compute and visualize straight stair geometries from basic architectural constraints, i.e. total rise to elevate and total length available.

[under complete reworking : code is now very simple and readable (<3), but there is work to do with the answered return [return is very complicated list-structure, too complex to explore]]
